summary: Φ_holo realtime hook + LRU 1024 precompute cache IMPLEMENTED for inference. http_server / hire_routes left untouched (git M, user in-progress) — wrap helpers + standalone harness. D3 Orch-OR sampler already 5/5 PASS.

hook.hidden_to_boundary: phirt_pool_to_boundary — chunked mean to fixed d_target
hook.production_dims_note: Native build에선 d=64/dB=128 권장 (phi_holographic_measure.hexa T5 latency=<50ms)

cache.hash: FNV1a-32 (XOR replaced by ADD for stage0 hexa compat) over prefix + '|' + style
cache.key_collision_check: T1 different style or prompt → different keys (manually verified)
hexa_quirks: lists pass-by-value → all mutators return new struct (feedback_hexa_lists_pbv)
no closures → caller computes phi externally then calls cache_record_compute
no XOR builtin → FNV1a uses ADD (slightly weaker but distribution-uniform)

wire_strategy.approach: wrap helper modules + standalone harness. http_server에 mount 시:
